{{CargoRelic
|name=Cuckoo Clock
|rank=Blue
|affct=ART
|birthday=01-15
|source=Lottery Machine (0.07%), Wishing (3%), Time Chest (2%), Novice Scrolls (1%)
|description=On Jan 15, 1738, Franz Anton Ketterer of the Black Forest made the world's first cuckoo clock.

Residents of the Black Forest make cuckoo clocks with their precise woodcarving techniques and local raw materials. From the internal parts to the external wood carvings, this kind of clock is all made with traditional craftsmanship. No two cuckoo clocks are the same. Each of them is made as a unique artifact.

[Authenticity]

Certificate: Certificate of the VDS.

Materials: All from the Black Forest of Germany.

Craftsmanship: 100% Handmade
|fame=22
|art=47
|fth=29
|civ=26
|tech=30
|ss1=Time Machine Max Cap +2%
|ss2=Time Machine Max Cap +4%
|ss3=Time Machine Max Cap +6%
|ss4=Time Machine Max Cap +10%
|ss7=Time Machine Max Cap +10%<br>Time Machine Max Cap +10% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Yamato skill I.png|50px]]Place in Yamato Museum: In Yamato, 2x INTEL Drops +2.5%
}}
[[Category:Relics]]
[[Category:Blue Relics]]
[[Category:ART Relics]]
[[Category:Blue ART Relics]]
[[Category:Time Machine Boost]]
[[Category:Yamato Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Yamato Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration Reagent Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration Card Drop Boost]]
